⚙ Settings
🏪 Store Identity
Store Name
Shown in header and printed schedules
🕐 Hours of Operation
Opens
When the store opens for customers
Closes
When the store closes for customers
Pre-Open Starts
Crew arrives before open for setup
Post-Close Ends
Last employee leaves — hard cutoff
📊 Staffing Periods
Peak Ends
Morning peak transitions to midday at this time
Midday Ends
Midday transitions to afternoon at this time
Pre-Open Staff
People in store before doors open — typically Oz + 1
MIN
MAX
Morning Peak Staff
6AM to 11AM
MIN
MAX
Midday Staff
11AM to 2PM
MIN
MAX
Afternoon Staff
2PM to close
MIN
MAX
🌙 Baker Schedule
Bakers per Night
Number of bakers scheduled overnight
MIN
MAX
Busy Night Baker Start
Busy nights (higher traffic) — baker start time
Slow Night Baker Start
Slow nights (lower traffic) — baker start time
Busy Days
Comma-separated days with higher traffic
Slow Days
Comma-separated days with lower traffic
⏱ Employee Hours
Max Hours per Day
No non-manager works more than this in a single day
Weekly Hours — Experienced
Target hours for priority crew
MIN
MAX
Weekly Hours — Standard
Target hours for support crew
MIN
MAX
Weekly Hours — All Non-MGMT
Absolute floor and ceiling
FLOOR

✨ AI Schedule Generator
Anthropic API Key
✓ Key saved — ready to generate
Availability Portal URL
Google Apps Script web app URL for employee self-service

🚫 Add Time Off

💬 Notify Staff via WhatsApp

Choose a week and generate a message to paste into your WhatsApp group chat.

Remove Employee

Clear all scheduled hours for the week of Mar 30? This cannot be undone.

Add Employee

Set availability windows in the roster table after adding.

💾 Choose Weeks to Save

Select which weeks to bake into the downloaded file. All roster and settings are always included.

✨ Choose Weeks for AI Schedule

Pick exactly 2 weeks for the AI to schedule. Weeks with existing shifts are marked — you can still select them but will be asked to confirm before overwriting.
